title: Welltower (WELL) Q4 FFO Beats Estimates Despite Higher Expenses
text: Concurrent with Q4 results that reflect seniors housing occupancy expansion, Welltower (WELL) announces a long-term strategic partnership with Reuben Brothers.

title: Welltower (WELL) Beats Q4 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Welltower (WELL) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 2.47% and 3.58%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in Store for Welltower (WELL) This Earnings Season?
text: Welltower's (WELL) Q4 results are likely to reflect seniors housing occupancy expansion on decent gains in the U.S., U.K. and Canada portfolios.
